collision energy: The normalized collision energy was set at 27.
enrichment method: The nitrosylome (the nitrosylated fraction of the proteome) was biotin-tagged using BST.
fractionation method: the flow-through peptides were separated with high pH reversed-phase offline fractionation cartridges.
instrument: a nanoflow ultra high-performance liquid chromatograph interfaced with an electrospray benchtop Orbitrap mass spectrometer (RSLCnano and Q Exactive HF-X, Thermo Fisher Scientific).
ionization type: a nanoflow ultra high-performance liquid chromatograph interfaced with an electrospray benchtop Orbitrap mass spectrometer.
labeling: Cleaned peptides were labeled with TMT10plex isobaric labeling reagent.
reduction reagent: DTT as a reducing agent to break disulfide bonds.
